# 7.2. Mindmap (Icons)

~~~mermaid
mindmap
  root((mindmap))

      Long history
      ::icon(fa fa-book)

    Research
      On effectiveness<br/>and features
      On Automatic creation
        Uses

            Argument mapping

      Mermaid
~~~
